title: Beyond efficiency: PayPal expands what's possible to build with AI
summary: PayPal is using Cursor's AI coding tool to accelerate development capabilities, with claims of delivering 40% more features in 2026 and completing a 3,000-app Java upgrade 6x faster through daily AI-assisted deployments.
